display_text: Has your organisation done any of the following to an AI system originally developed by someone else? Select all that apply.
hint_text: Under Article 25, performing any of these actions makes you legally treated as the Provider of the AI system, with full provider obligations (Article 16). 'Substantial modification' means a change that affects compliance or intended purpose — not a minor bug fix. Select 'None of the above' only if you have not done any of these things.

options.label: I place or have placed this AI system on the market or into service under my own name or trademark
I have changed the intended purpose of this AI system beyond what the original provider specified
I have made a substantial modification to the AI system (e.g., retraining, significant architectural change, major update affecting compliance)
None of the above — I have not modified the system, changed its purpose, or marketed it under my own name
